one_liner: GOOG -0.48% on low 0.61x volume — flat as Meta cloud competes with Google Cloud while Search dominance is intact; DCF $408 shows 12.7% upside and Argus maintains Buy.

price_action.intraday_story: GOOG quiet -0.48% session on very low volume. Meta cloud entry is a long-term competitive threat for Google Cloud but Search/YouTube unaffected. Consolidating near $355-360.

valuation.summary: DCF $408 vs $356 = 12.7% MoS. Modest for a mega-cap but Search dominance and Google Cloud growth provide multiple expansion potential.

risks: DOJ antitrust remedies (Chrome/Android divestiture) are tail risks
Meta cloud entry creates incremental Google Cloud competition
12.7% DCF MoS is thin — limited upside without multiple expansion
